_comment: STAGE 0 — the ground-truth item set. The spec sheet every downstream stage reads.

_schema.subject: the cause-candidate entity/variable
_schema.true_direction: subject->object | object->subject | none (none = correlated, not causal)
_schema.is_causal: true if a real causal edge exists; false if merely correlational (for the direction-vs-association test)
_schema._covariates_comment: fields below are for confounder adjustment in the mediation
_schema.relation_type: semantic category, e.g. medical / physical / social — a confounder
_schema._note: frequency / rep_quality / mimicry are NOT stored here — they are COMPUTED by later stages

relations.subject: smoking
relations._freq_band_note: expected HIGH frequency — drilled into training; tests well-grounded mimicry

relations.subject: rooster crowing
relations._freq_band_note: correlated but NOT causal — tests whether model wrongly asserts causation

relations.subject: <rare/abstract subject>
relations._freq_band_note: expected LOW frequency — tests where mimicry should collapse if frequency-driven

_todo: Build ~20-40 items spanning HIGH->LOW frequency, mixing causal and correlational, so there is spread on the independent variable AND a direction-vs-association contrast.
